def _make_enhance_req(width: int, height: int, req_id: str = "f001") -> dict:
    pixels = np.zeros((height, width, 3), dtype=np.uint8)
    b64 = base64.b64encode(pixels.tobytes()).decode("ascii")
    return {
        "type": "enhance",
        "id": req_id,
        "format": "raw_rgb",
        "image_b64": b64,
        "width": width,
        "height": height,
        "no_artifact_reduce": False,
        "upscale_factor": 2,
    }
